title: Ammonia Solution 9.6-9.9% Technical 250 ml
description: Product description Description: Ammonia solution 9.6-9.9% or also called ammonia spirit, smells pungent of ammonia and irritates mucous membranes and eyes. Applications: For cleaning and degreasing zinc, aluminum, copper, etc. For degreasing primer doors, door frames and large surfaces before painting. Salmiac spirit is used as a home remedy for cleaning surfaces in the household (an approximately 10% solution for window cleaning). In the laboratory as a lye for bleaching. In dyeing processes. For architects as a developer for the light pause process, paramedics use smell sticks with a diluted ammonia solution to wake up from a faint. As this product poses hazards to people and/or the environment, the delivery is only to customers of legal age. By purchasing and creating your customer account, you confirm that you are of legal age (see terms and conditions of our shop/Amazon). Safety Warning Danger
